leadText: Coil redirects here. For the Pokémon named Coil in Japanese, see Magnemite (Pokémon). Coil (Japanese: とぐろをまく Coil Up) is a non-damaging Poison-type move introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Coil raises the user's Attack , Defense , and accuracy stats by one stage each. If powered up by a Poisonium Z into Z-Coil, all of the user's lowered stats are reset.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user coils up and concentrates. This raises its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy. S V The user coils up and concentrates. This boosts its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It boosts your Attack, Defense, and accuracy. (The stat changes return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.) S MD It boosts your Attack, Defense, and accuracy. The stats return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move, along with Hone Claws and Acupressure , are the only moves that raise the accuracy stat. Fitting for its name, most Pokémon that can learn this move have a serpentine body.
